subject: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi Irene,

I had a call with DataFlow Systems today about the Analytics Pipeline
integration. Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the testing phase by 11/11, which is 2 weeks behind our
schedule
- Pricing: $352K for the base package + $76K for Security Hardening add-on
- They require a 3-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Olivia Davis (Product Manager)

For comparison, DataFlow Systems quoted $359K with a more flexible contract.

Should we bring this to the Board Meeting for a final decision?

Best,
Tina
--
Tina Taylor
Architect | Starkindustries
+1-989-809-1066

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Team,

Effective Thursday, we're updating the Travel Reimbursement policy.  Key changes:

1. Legal approval is now required for any Logging Service changes in production
(previously only staging required approval)
2. All PRs affecting Falcon must include security review
3. North America deployments will follow a new feature-flag strategy
4. Incident response SLA updated: P1 = 28min, P2 = 59min

Full policy doc: https://wiki.internal/policies/d3c4a9c566

Please review by EOD Wednesday and flag any concerns to Tina.

Thanks,
David

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Hi Grace,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the Support team and they're looking
into the Analytics Pipeline issue. Current status:

- Root cause: race condition in queue consumer
- Impact: ~192 users affected in LATAM
- ETA for fix: 17:30 PST today
- Severity: P2

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Leo is the point person if you
need immediate assistance.

Workaround: Retry after 5 minutes.

Regards,
David

Best,
David Gonzalez
Technical Lead, Data Science
Acmecorp

subject: Re: Meeting Notes: Finance Sync 8/12
content:
Olivia — 

Got it, makes sense. I'll loop in Fatima from Support to get their perspective
on the CI/CD Platform changes. In the meantime, I've created a shared doc where
we can track the open items:

  https://docs.google.com/d/74db120f0a8e5646

Current open items (6 total):
- Phoenix integration testing (owner: Olivia)
- Pinnacle Analytics contract review (owner: Tina)
- Data Governance documentation (owner: Fatima)

Please add any additional concerns there. I'll consolidate everything before our
Monday sync.

Thanks,
Tina

Best,
Tina Taylor
Architect, Support
Starkindustries
